name: Hackathon Setup Guide
description: This guide provides a step-by-step process for setting up Featherless.ai, including signing up for the service, obtaining an API key, and choosing a model for your use case. It also covers how to make API calls using Python Requests and OpenAI SDK, troubleshooting common errors, and details on concurrency limits and costs.
context: unlimited access to thousands of open-source AI models

name: Integration Guides
description: Detailed guides are available to help integrate Featherless.ai into existing projects and workflows.
